import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Header.css'; import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const Header = ({ title = "Dashboard" }) => { const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false); const { user } = useAuth(); // Ensure user is authenticated return ( <>

{title}

{user?.name}
{user?.email}
{/* Notification Modal */}
Notifications

No Notification found!

); }; export default Header;
